name: Roasted Garlic Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Chicken stock or canned broth, heated
Salt and fresh ground White pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cut off the top 1/4 inch of each garlic head.
3. Place garlic heads in a small shallow baking dish. Drizzle oil over them.
4. Bake until golden, about 1 hour. Cool slightly.
5. Press individual garlic cloves between thumb and finger to release garlic. Chop the garlic.
6. Melt butter in a heavy large saucepan over medium heat. Add garlic, leeks, and onion and sauté until onion is translucent, about 8 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to low. Add flour and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Stir in hot stock and Sherry. Simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Cool slightly. Puree soup in batches in a blender or processor. (Can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate.)
10. Return soup to saucepan. Add cream and simmer until thickened, about 10 minutes.
11. Add lemon juice to taste. Season with salt and white pepper.
12. Ladle into bowls. Garnish with chives.
